scripts.dev: concurrently -n auth,workspace,project,task,notify,workflow,comms,file,meeting -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue,red,white,gray,cyan "npm run dev -w @pms/auth-service" "npm run dev -w @pms/workspace-service" "npm run dev -w @pms/project-service" "npm run dev -w @pms/task-service" "npm run dev -w @pms/notification-service" "npm run dev -w @pms/workflow-engine" "npm run dev -w @pms/comms-service" "npm run dev -w @pms/file-service" "npm run dev -w @pms/meeting-service"
scripts.dev:phase1: concurrently -n auth,workspace -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @pms/auth-service" "npm run dev -w @pms/workspace-service"
scripts.dev:phase2: concurrently -n auth,workspace,project,task -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w @pms/auth-service" "npm run dev -w @pms/workspace-service" "npm run dev -w @pms/project-service" "npm run dev -w @pms/task-service"
scripts.dev:phase3: concurrently -n notify,workflow,comms,file,meeting -c blue,red,white,gray,cyan "npm run dev -w @pms/notification-service" "npm run dev -w @pms/workflow-engine" "npm run dev -w @pms/comms-service" "npm run dev -w @pms/file-service" "npm run dev -w @pms/meeting-service"
scripts.test: KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/auth-service && KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/workspace-service && KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/project-service && KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/task-service && KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/notification-service && KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/workflow-engine && KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/comms-service && KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/file-service && KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/meeting-service
scripts.test:coverage: KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/auth-service -- --coverage && KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/workspace-service -- --coverage && KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/project-service -- --coverage && KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/task-service -- --coverage && KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/notification-service -- --coverage && KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/workflow-engine -- --coverage && KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/comms-service -- --coverage && KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/file-service -- --coverage && KAFKAJS_NO_PARTITIONER_WARNING=1 npm run test -w @pms/meeting-service -- --coverage
scripts.db:migrate:all: npm run db:migrate -w @pms/auth-service && npm run db:migrate -w @pms/workspace-service && npm run db:migrate -w @pms/project-service && npm run db:migrate -w @pms/task-service && npm run db:migrate -w @pms/notification-service && npm run db:migrate -w @pms/workflow-engine && npm run db:migrate -w @pms/comms-service && npm run db:migrate -w @pms/file-service && npm run db:migrate -w @pms/meeting-service
scripts.db:deploy:all: npm run db:deploy -w @pms/auth-service && npm run db:deploy -w @pms/workspace-service && npm run db:deploy -w @pms/project-service && npm run db:deploy -w @pms/task-service && npm run db:deploy -w @pms/notification-service && npm run db:deploy -w @pms/workflow-engine && npm run db:deploy -w @pms/comms-service && npm run db:deploy -w @pms/file-service && npm run db:deploy -w @pms/meeting-service
scripts.db:generate:all: npm run db:generate -w @pms/auth-service && npm run db:generate -w @pms/workspace-service && npm run db:generate -w @pms/project-service && npm run db:generate -w @pms/task-service && npm run db:generate -w @pms/notification-service && npm run db:generate -w @pms/workflow-engine && npm run db:generate -w @pms/comms-service && npm run db:generate -w @pms/file-service && npm run db:generate -w @pms/meeting-service
